_comment: A federation of two TASE.2 control centres. Each center runs its own server with its own domain and point model. A 'tie' shares a scoped set of points from one center to another: the relay (suite/relay.py) subscribes to the source center and writes the mapped points into the destination center over real ICCP, so a partner sees the intertie data without measuring it locally. What a center is willing to share is its bilateral agreement; enforce it with a bilateral table on that center's server (-B). Add more centers and ties to model a wider interconnect.
